product_results.title: Nike Womens WMNS Air Max Correlate 511417 136 - Size 8W

summary.text: Customers find these shoes visually appealing, noting they look great and are very nice in appearance. However, opinions are mixed regarding the fit, comfort, and overall quality of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Great Purchase!
authors_reviews.text: SO CUTE and comfy! Love them so much!
authors_reviews.author: Danielle

authors_reviews.title: Poor quality
authors_reviews.text: Please see on the left shoe black is separating I have worn these less than 10 times I’m beyond sad about this !Left is lifting right is perfect
authors_reviews.author: Coral Rackstraw
